title: ItemDef
description: A data-defined item (plan/02 §4): tags, optional equipment slot, use-actions (effect primitives), and equip effects (modifier primitives active while worn). Currency is just an item with the "currency" tag.

description.description: One line for humans and LLMs (surfaced by the manifest).

inherits.description: Parent def ID (same kind); objects deep-merge, scalars override, arrays replace or take {"$append"/"$remove"} patches.

slot.description: Slot def ID this item equips into; null = not equippable.

basePrice.description: Base price used by shop price formulas (the BasePrice identifier).

useActions.description: Effect primitives executed on use (source = user, target = use target).

equipEffects.description: Modifier primitives active while equipped (PeriodicEffect not allowed here).
